findings.description: PascalCase class names `DataReader`, `DataReaderFactory`, and `Result.Success` appear in the s2 section content (execution context copy table and exception handling step 3a) but are absent from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Execution context table lists `DataReader` and `DataReaderFactory` as data types. Step 3a states: 'ループを中断し `Result.Success` を返却して終了コード0で正常終了させる。'
